title: ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Hand Crank Emergency AM/FM Weather Radio with Flashlight
description:
Be ready for any situation with this 4 in 1 Emergency Hand Crank Radio, Flashlight, Power Bank and Siren from ASR Outdoor, your all-in-one survival tool for light, power and communication. Whether you’re preparing for a power outage, camping off grid, or building an emergency kit, this compact device ensures you stay safe, connected and informed. Equipped with a bright LED flashlight and a built-in 750mAh rechargeable battery, it delivers up to 15 hours of reliable light or 14 hours of AM/FM radio play on a single charge. Multiple charging options—including USB-C fast charging and a hand-crank generator—make it easy to stay powered anywhere. Just one minute of cranking gives you 5 minutes of light, 5 minutes of radio, or 1 minute of emergency siren use.

ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Hand Crank Emergency AM/FM Weather Radio with Flashlight

Be ready for any situation with this 4 in 1 Emergency Hand Crank Radio, Flashlight, Power Bank and Siren from ASR Outdoor, your all-in-one survival tool for light, power and communication. Whether you’re preparing for a power outage, camping off grid, or building an emergency kit, this compact device ensures you stay safe, connected and informed.

Equipped with a bright LED flashlight and a built-in 750mAh rechargeable battery, it delivers up to 15 hours of reliable light or 14 hours of AM/FM radio play on a single charge. Multiple charging options—including USB-C fast charging and a hand-crank generator—make it easy to stay powered anywhere. Just one minute of cranking gives you 5 minutes of light, 5 minutes of radio, or 1 minute of emergency siren use.

Key Features

  • VERSATILE FLASHLIGHT: Reliable emergency crank flashlight delivers up to 15 hours of bright light on a single charge, ideal for blackout preparedness, to include with camping gear, survival kits and much more
  • RECHARGEABLE BATTERY: 750 mAh capacity fully recharges in just 4 hours and powers up to 15 hours of flashlight use or 14 hours of AM/FM radio operation
  • MULTIPLE CHARGING OPTIONS: Stay powered anywhere with USB-C charging (cable included) or hand-crank generator; 1 minute of cranking provides 5 minutes of light, 5 minutes of radio, or 1 minute of emergency alarm
  • EMERGENCY POWER BANK: Doubles as a portable charger with USB-A output to keep smartphones and small devices powered when outlets aren’t available
  • AM/FM RADIO: Tuning and volume controls with AM (520–1710 MHz) and FM (87.5–108 MHz) reception keep you informed during storms, disasters, or off-grid adventures; easy to use tuning and volume dials

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO-WAFEK6O5
  • UPC: 810131706388
  • Color: Black

This versatile device also works as a portable power bank, featuring a USB-A output to charge smartphones and small electronics when outlets aren’t available. The AM/FM radio provides clear reception for news or weather updates, keeping you informed during storms, disasters or outdoor adventures.

Compact and lightweight at just 5" x 2-1/4", the two-tone gray and black design easily fits into emergency kits, bug-out bags, backpacks or glove compartments. With its built in emergency siren, intuitive controls, and durable construction, this survival radio flashlight is a must have emergency preparedness item.

Stay prepared, stay safe, and stay connected with the ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Emergency Multitool, a must-have for every outdoor enthusiast.
